en.hero.title: Give your cocktail event, bar or brand global visibility.
en.hero.subtitle: World of Mixologists helps guest shifts, takeovers, bars, bartenders, brands and cocktail events become visible before, during and after they happen.
en.hero.statement: WØM gives visibility. Bartendly makes it discoverable. Bartendly Experiences turns it into paid service.
en.hero.panelQuote: If you want your cocktail event to be seen, work with WØM. If you want it to be discoverable, list it on Bartendly.
en.hero.panelText: For guest shifts, cocktail weeks, brand activations, bar launches, trade shows and hospitality projects, WØM and Bartendly help connect visibility, discovery and action.
en.hero.fact1Text: Put WØM and Bartendly on your flyers and event communication.
en.hero.fact2Text: Create visibility before, during and after the event.
en.hero.fact3Text: Use Bartendly to see what is happening by city and date.
en.hero.fact4Text: Use Bartendly Experiences to hire bartenders for premium events.
en.paths.title: Choose what you need.
en.paths.intro: WØM is built around clear action: partner for visibility, list events on Bartendly, hire bartenders, launch campaigns, join the app or work with selected hospitality professionals.
en.paths.event.label: Events
en.paths.event.title: Make your cocktail event visible
en.paths.event.text: For guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, bar collaborations and cocktail events, WØM can help create visibility while Bartendly gives the event a structured place to live.
en.paths.clients.label: Clients
en.paths.clients.title: Hire bartenders for an event
en.paths.clients.text: For trade shows, brand activations, corporate events and large private events, Bartendly Experiences helps clients coordinate selected bartenders.
en.paths.bartender.label: Bartenders
en.paths.bartender.title: Join Bartendly for visibility and paid requests
en.paths.bartender.text: Create your profile, publish events, become visible for guest shifts, jobs and future Bartendly Experiences requests.
en.paths.brands.label: Brands
en.paths.brands.title: Launch a cocktail culture campaign
en.paths.brands.text: Connect your brand to the cocktail scene through WØM visibility, Bartendly event structure, bartender/bar connections and optional Bartendly Experiences execution.
en.paths.festivals.label: Festivals
en.paths.festivals.title: Partner for a cocktail week or bar show
en.paths.festivals.text: Give your program stronger visibility with WØM while using Bartendly to make events discoverable by city, date, bar, bartender and brand.
en.paths.consulting.label: Bar projects
en.paths.consulting.title: Find selected hospitality professionals
en.paths.consulting.text: For bar launches, menu direction, guest shift programming, concept support or activations, WØM and Bartendly can connect you with selected professionals.
en.eventPartners.title: Partner with WØM for your next guest shift, takeover or cocktail event.
en.eventPartners.text: We help make your event visible before, during and after it happens — highlighting the host bar, guest bartenders, visiting bar, brands and event story across WØM and Bartendly.
en.eventPartners.text2: WØM can appear as a visibility partner on your flyer and communication. Bartendly gives the event a structured place where people can discover what is happening, who is involved and where to go.
en.events.leftTitle: Make your event discoverable on Bartendly.
en.events.leftText: List guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, cocktail weeks, brand activations and bar events on Bartendly so people can see what is happening by city and date.
en.events.rightTitle: Discover what is happening in the cocktail scene.
en.events.rightText: Use Bartendly to discover cocktail events, guest shifts, bar collaborations and hospitality moments happening around you or in the city you are visiting.
en.events.item1: Find what is happening tonight or this week.
en.events.item2: Discover bars, bartenders and brands involved.
en.events.item3: Follow the cocktail scene with more context.
en.experiences.title: Hire professional bartenders for trade shows, brand activations and corporate events.
en.experiences.intro: Bartendly Experiences helps corporate clients, agencies, brands and event organizers coordinate selected bartenders for premium events. Bartenders can join Bartendly to be visible for future paid requests.
en.experiences.clients.title: For clients
en.experiences.clients.text: Need bartenders for an exhibition stand, brand activation, corporate reception or large private event? Bartendly Experiences helps coordinate the bartender side clearly and professionally.
en.experiences.bartenders.title: For bartenders
en.experiences.bartenders.text: Join Bartendly, create your profile and be visible when relevant paid event requests come in through Bartendly Experiences.
en.campaigns.title: Create visibility where cocktail culture actually happens.
en.campaigns.intro: For brands, agencies, festivals and bar shows, WØM and Bartendly connect visibility, events, bartenders, bars and real-world activations.
en.campaigns.brand.title: Brand campaigns
en.campaigns.brand.text: For spirits brands, mixers, bar tools, hotels and hospitality brands that want to connect with the cocktail scene through people, places and events.
en.campaigns.brand.item1: WØM visibility across editorial and social channels.
en.campaigns.brand.item2: Bartendly event listing and structured discovery.
en.campaigns.festival.title: Festival & bar show partnerships
en.campaigns.festival.text: For cocktail weeks, bar shows and hospitality festivals that need event discovery, community reach and stronger visibility before and during the program.
en.campaigns.festival.item2: Bartendly event listings or event hub.
en.campaigns.activation.title: Guest shift & activation support
en.campaigns.activation.text: For bars and brands organizing collaborations, takeovers or cocktail moments that need visibility, context and a stronger event story.
en.campaigns.activation.item1: Host bar and guest bartender visibility.
en.campaigns.activation.item2: Partner mention on communication and flyers.
en.app.leftTitle: Download Bartendly on the App Store.
en.app.leftText: Use Bartendly to discover cocktail events, explore bars, publish guest shifts, build your bartender profile and stay visible for hospitality opportunities.
en.app.rightTitle: Visibility becomes stronger when it has a place to live.
en.app.rightText: WØM creates attention. Bartendly gives that attention structure: profiles, events, city discovery, bar pages, event history and future opportunities.
en.app.item1: Bartenders: create your profile and be visible for opportunities.
en.app.item2: Bars: publish events and build your presence.
en.app.item3: Organizers: make events discoverable by city and date.
en.app.item4: Guests: discover what is happening in the cocktail scene.
en.consultancy.title: Need support for a bar project?
en.consultancy.intro: Through our hospitality network, WØM and Bartendly can connect bars and brands with selected professionals for concept support, guest shift programming, menu direction, launch support and activation ideas.
en.consultancy.card1.title: Bar concept & launch support
en.consultancy.card1.text: For new bars, relaunches and projects that need sharper hospitality direction or access to the right professionals.
en.consultancy.card2.title: Guest shift programming
en.consultancy.card2.text: Support for collaborations, takeovers and guest shifts that need both curation and operational understanding.
en.consultancy.card3.title: Menu, service and activation support
en.consultancy.card3.text: Targeted help through selected professionals for menu direction, service training, activations or specific hospitality needs.
en.about.title: An editorial voice for the people, places and moments that make cocktail culture worth following.
en.about.intro: WØM documents, highlights and supports what matters in hospitality: bartenders, bars, creators, guest shifts, concepts, cities and experiences that create desire, memory and return value.
en.about.card1Title: A living view of cocktail culture
en.about.card1Text: WØM captures bars, guest shifts, creators, hospitality scenes and city energy as a curated editorial layer with a real point of view.
en.about.card2Title: Real places. Real people. Real events.
en.about.card2Text: WØM gives visibility to the bars, professionals and moments that create true hospitality value — while Bartendly turns that visibility into structured discovery and action.
en.selection.title: For bars worth discovering and returning to.
en.selection.intro: WØM Selection highlights bars that create atmosphere, memory, social energy and a genuine desire to return.
en.selection.card1.title: What it stands for
en.selection.card1.text: Atmosphere, feeling, people, experience, memory, social energy and a place that stays in your mind after you leave.
en.selection.quote: A place you don’t just visit — a place you come back to.
en.selection.card2.title: A cultural signal
en.selection.card2.text: The badge is a way to make meaningful bars more visible in the cocktail world. It connects naturally with WØM visibility and Bartendly discovery, without becoming the core commercial offer of the page.
en.instagram.title: Follow the live visibility layer of the cocktail scene.
en.instagram.intro: Instagram is where hospitality visibility moves fast: guest shifts, city moments, bars, creators and the pulse of cocktail culture. WØM uses it as an editorial distribution engine.
en.instagram.tile1Text: What is happening now, tonight and next.
en.instagram.tile2Text: Places with identity, atmosphere and return value.
en.instagram.tile4Text: The pulse of cocktail culture worldwide.
en.final.title: Make the cocktail world see what you are building.
en.final.text: Partner with WØM for event visibility. List your event on Bartendly for structured discovery. Use Bartendly Experiences when you need professional bartenders. Join the app if you are a bartender, bar, brand or event organizer.
en.footer.copy: All rights reserved. Visibility with meaning. Structure with purpose.

bartendlyPage.heroText: Guest shifts, takeovers, cocktail events, bars and bartenders — powered by Bartendly and amplified by World of Mixologists.
bartendlyPage.heroNote: On iPhone now. Web calendar available for everyone.
bartendlyPage.startTitle: What do you want to do?
bartendlyPage.startIntro: Choose the right action: download the app, open the calendar, add your event or hire bartenders.
bartendlyPage.cardDownloadText: Get the app to discover cocktail events, bars, bartenders and future hospitality opportunities.
bartendlyPage.cardDownloadNote: Android access is coming. Use the web calendar for now.
bartendlyPage.cardCalendarText: See guest shifts, takeovers, masterclasses, cocktail weeks and bar events happening around the world.
bartendlyPage.cardAddText: Hosting a guest shift, takeover, masterclass or cocktail event? Add it on Bartendly so the scene can find it.
bartendlyPage.cardHireText: Need professional bartenders for a trade show, brand activation, corporate event or private event?
bartendlyPage.whyTitle: Cocktail events should not disappear in Stories.
bartendlyPage.whyText: Cocktail culture moves fast. Guest shifts, takeovers and events often disappear inside Instagram stories, flyers and private chats. Bartendly gives them a place to live, be discovered and stay connected to the bars, bartenders and brands behind them.
bartendlyPage.whyBullet1: Find what is happening tonight or this week.
bartendlyPage.whyBullet2: Discover bars, bartenders and events by city.
bartendlyPage.whyBullet3: Add your own events and become visible to the scene.
bartendlyPage.proTitle: Built for bartenders, bars and event organizers.
bartendlyPage.proIntro: Bartendly is becoming a professional layer for the cocktail world: profiles, events, visibility, collaborations and future opportunities.
bartendlyPage.proBartendersText: Build visibility and connect your profile to real events, bars and future opportunities.
bartendlyPage.proBarsText: Publish events, show what is happening at your venue and build a stronger presence.
bartendlyPage.proOrganizersText: Make activations, takeovers and cocktail events easier to discover before and after they happen.
bartendlyPage.womTitle: Want to be featured by WØM?
bartendlyPage.womLine: Add your event on Bartendly so it can be discovered, structured and potentially featured.
bartendlyPage.womText: World of Mixologists highlights selected guest shifts, bars, bartenders and cocktail events worldwide. Not every event will be featured, but Bartendly is the best place to make it visible.
bartendlyPage.expText: Bartendly Experiences helps companies, agencies, brands and private clients coordinate selected bartenders for trade shows, brand activations, corporate events and premium private events.
bartendlyPage.expBullet3: Premium private events and hospitality projects.
bartendlyPage.finalTitle: WOM gives cocktail culture visibility. Bartendly gives it a place to live.
bartendlyPage.finalText: Download the app, open the calendar, add your event or hire bartenders — depending on what you need today.
